rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same material api-design flaws grounded in the diff (vacuous IsUnipotent under geomReduced; partial AlgPoints vs. promised functor-of-points; tautological unipotentRadical_trivial' lemma; semantically empty ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup classes with only True), and following either removes these to yield equivalent cleanups; Review 2's extras (e.g., redundant instance, variable shadowing, naming/simp nits) are either duplicate or stylistic and do not produce a meaningfully better result.
